decisions.reason: Both required seals are supported as intact by the controlling signed scans. For red, o1 (signed_scan, intact, hour 90) controls over the later conflicting o2 (unsigned_note, broken, hour 95) because the signed scan is the stronger custody record; the unsigned note is retained in the evidence account but does not override it. For blue, o3 (signed_scan, intact, hour 80) is the controlling and only observation.
